name: NOBLE ROMANS INC
business: Noble Roman's, Inc. sells and services franchises and licenses and operates Company-owned stand-alone restaurants and non-traditional foodservice operations under the trade names Noble Roman's Craft Pizza & Pub, Noble Roman's Pizza, Noble Roman's Take-N-Bake, and Tuscano's Italian Style Subs. The company focuses on franchising non-traditional locations such as convenience stores, hospitals, and other facilities.

exposures.sentence: Noble Roman’s, Inc., an Indiana corporation incorporated in 1972, sells and services franchises and licenses and operates Company-owned stand-alone restaurants and non-traditional foodservice operations under the trade names Noble Roman’s Craft Pizza & Pub, Noble Roman’s Pizza, Noble Roman’s Take-N-Bake, and Tuscano’s Italian Style Subs.

catalysts.event: Development of 100 franchise locations for Majors Management LLC
catalysts.sentence: For example, in October 2023, the Company entered into a development agreement with Majors Management LLC for 100 franchise locations to be developed prior to September 30, 2026.
